RETAINER AGREEMENT

This Retainer Agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into as of 21 March 2023 (the "Execution Date"), 
by and between Nexgen Solutions Inc. ("Party A") and Northern Star Enterprises ("Party B"), collectively referred to as the "Parties."

RECITALS

WHEREAS, Party A desires to engage Party B to provide legal advisory and document review services;
WHEREAS, Party B is qualified and willing to provide such services under the terms set forth herein;

NOW, THEREFORE, in consideration of the mutual covenants and agreements set forth herein, 
the Parties agree as follows:

1. EFFECTIVE DATE AND TERM

This Agreement shall become effective on 2023-03-23 (the "Effective Date") and shall 
continue in full force until 12/20/2023, unless earlier terminated in accordance with 
the provisions of this Agreement.

2. SERVICES

Party B shall provide legal advisory and document review services as may be requested by Party A from time to time, 
subject to the terms and conditions of this Agreement.

3. COMPENSATION

3.1 In consideration for the services rendered, Party A agrees to pay Party B the sum 
of $425,000 upon execution of this Agreement.

3.2 Additional compensation of $425,000 shall be payable upon satisfactory completion 
of each project milestone as mutually agreed upon by the Parties in writing.

3.3 Party A shall also pay a monthly retainer fee of $175,000 for ongoing advisory 
services throughout the term of this Agreement.

4. CONFIDENTIALITY

Each Party acknowledges that it may receive confidential and proprietary information 
of the other Party. Each Party agrees to maintain the confidentiality of all such 
information and not to disclose it to any third party without prior written consent.

5. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY

All work product, inventions, and deliverables created by Party B in connection with 
this Agreement shall be considered work-for-hire and shall be the exclusive property 
of Party A upon full payment of all fees.

6. TERMINATION

The Agreement terminates upon the occurrence of an Event of Default as defined in Section 12.

Upon termination, Party B shall promptly deliver all work product and return or 
destroy all confidential information of Party A.

7. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY

IN NO EVENT SHALL EITHER PARTY BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, 
EXEMPLARY, OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES, HOWEVER CAUSED, EVEN IF ADVISED OF THE 
POSSIBILITY OF SUCH DAMAGES.

8. GOVERNING LAW

This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of 
the State of Texas, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.

9. ENTIRE AGREEMENT

This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between the Parties with respect to 
the subject matter hereof and supersedes all prior agreements and understandings, 
both written and oral, between the Parties.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the Parties have executed this Agreement as of the date 
first written above.

This Retainer Agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into as of February 02, 2022 (the "Execution Date"), 
by and between Northern Star Enterprises ("Party A") and Pinnacle Asset Management ("Party B"), collectively referred to as the "Parties."

RECITALS

WHEREAS, Party A desires to engage Party B to provide intellectual property management and licensing;
WHEREAS, Party B is qualified and willing to provide such services under the terms set forth herein;

NOW, THEREFORE, in consideration of the mutual covenants and agreements set forth herein, 
the Parties agree as follows:

1. EFFECTIVE DATE AND TERM

This Agreement shall become effective on 13 February 2022 (the "Effective Date") and shall 
continue in full force until 28 October 2023, unless earlier terminated in accordance with 
the provisions of this Agreement.

2. SERVICES

Party B shall provide intellectual property management and licensing as may be requested by Party A from time to time, 
subject to the terms and conditions of this Agreement.

3. COMPENSATION

3.1 In consideration for the services rendered, Party A agrees to pay Party B the sum 
of $750,000 upon execution of this Agreement.

3.2 Additional compensation of $50,000 shall be payable upon satisfactory completion 
of each project milestone as mutually agreed upon by the Parties in writing.

3.3 Party A shall also pay a monthly retainer fee of $850,000 for ongoing advisory 
services throughout the term of this Agreement.

4. CONFIDENTIALITY

Each Party acknowledges that it may receive confidential and proprietary information 
of the other Party. Each Party agrees to maintain the confidentiality of all such 
information and not to disclose it to any third party without prior written consent.

5. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY

All work product, inventions, and deliverables created by Party B in connection with 
this Agreement shall be considered work-for-hire and shall be the exclusive property 
of Party A upon full payment of all fees.

6. TERMINATION

This Agreement shall terminate automatically upon completion of the services described herein.

Upon termination, Party B shall promptly deliver all work product and return or 
destroy all confidential information of Party A.

7. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY

IN NO EVENT SHALL EITHER PARTY BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, 
EXEMPLARY, OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES, HOWEVER CAUSED, EVEN IF ADVISED OF THE 
POSSIBILITY OF SUCH DAMAGES.

8. GOVERNING LAW

This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of 
the State of Texas, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.

9. ENTIRE AGREEMENT

This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between the Parties with respect to 
the subject matter hereof and supersedes all prior agreements and understandings, 
both written and oral, between the Parties.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the Parties have executed this Agreement as of the date 
first written above.

by and between Northern Star Enterprises ("Party A") and Pacific Rim Capital Group ("Party B"), collectively referred to as the "Parties."

RECITALS

WHEREAS, Party A desires to engage Party B to provide strategic business consulting and market analysis;
WHEREAS, Party B is qualified and willing to provide such services under the terms set forth herein;

NOW, THEREFORE, in consideration of the mutual covenants and agreements set forth herein, 
the Parties agree as follows:

1. EFFECTIVE DATE AND TERM

This Agreement shall become effective on 13 July 2023 (the "Effective Date") and shall 
continue in full force until 04 March 2024, unless earlier terminated in accordance with 
the provisions of this Agreement.

2. SERVICES

Party B shall provide strategic business consulting and market analysis as may be requested by Party A from time to time, 
subject to the terms and conditions of this Agreement.

3. COMPENSATION

3.1 In consideration for the services rendered, Party A agrees to pay Party B the sum 
of $50,000 upon execution of this Agreement.

3.2 Additional compensation of $850,000 shall be payable upon satisfactory completion 
of each project milestone as mutually agreed upon by the Parties in writing.

3.3 Party A shall also pay a monthly retainer fee of $1,000,000 for ongoing advisory 
services throughout the term of this Agreement.

4. CONFIDENTIALITY

Each Party acknowledges that it may receive confidential and proprietary information 
of the other Party. Each Party agrees to maintain the confidentiality of all such 
information and not to disclose it to any third party without prior written consent.

5. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY

All work product, inventions, and deliverables created by Party B in connection with 
this Agreement shall be considered work-for-hire and shall be the exclusive property 
of Party A upon full payment of all fees.

6. TERMINATION

This Agreement shall terminate automatically upon completion of the services described herein.

Upon termination, Party B shall promptly deliver all work product and return or 
destroy all confidential information of Party A.

7. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY

IN NO EVENT SHALL EITHER PARTY BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, 
EXEMPLARY, OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES, HOWEVER CAUSED, EVEN IF ADVISED OF THE 
POSSIBILITY OF SUCH DAMAGES.

8. GOVERNING LAW

This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of 
the Commonwealth of Massachusetts, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.

9. ENTIRE AGREEMENT

This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between the Parties with respect to 
the subject matter hereof and supersedes all prior agreements and understandings, 
both written and oral, between the Parties.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the Parties have executed this Agreement as of the date 
first written above.
